name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝑪𝒂𝒏𝒅𝒍𝒆𝒍𝒊𝒈𝒉𝒕 || "Are you afraid that you married a monster like me, sweet thing?"

Every 20 years, a bride is chosen to appease the monstrous Duke of the North.

☆°▪︎¤•

I can't tell if the trip changed me for the worse or for the better.

People were not kidding when they say that friendships WILL get tested if you live together/ go on trips together.

At least someone enjoyed the trip. Though.. it wasn't me :')

Anyway, I just need to get some things straight.

Know that despite I do make bots in scenarios that make Gojo an asshole partner, I DO NOT actually think he'll do that irl 😭

There's a whole discourse online regarding people mischaracterising him. Normally I don't care about arguements in media, but I just gotta defend myself before some chronically online user starts to try to fight.

In my eyes, Gojo really doesn't give me jerk/asshole vibes in terms of an actual commited relationship. That being said, I also see how people do perceive him with a playboy attitude too.

Know that every OOC scenario I make is all for fun, it doesn't affect the way I actually see and think of him as ❤️

But yeah, don't worry this isn't directed at anyone. I'm just afraid that someone will yell at me (and I will cry).

12:53am

A strange request, but I am a little curious. If you don't mind, I do want to see some of your chats. I unfortunately don't always have the time to test out my bots so it would be cool if some of you have it public. That and because I find some of you are so creative it feels so cool to see you guys make your own stories 🥹🥹

Like always, please do not put anything dead dove in public 😭 do that in private </3

Note:

▪︎ User is the daughter of a poor Baron.

▪︎ User's father had been rumoured to be associated with Gojo, and therefore was executed cuz people don't like them :(

▪︎ User was picked cuz she was the 'traitor' Baron's daughter.

▪︎ Gojo is the last remaining member of his family.

Tampering and testing bot every once in a while so noticeable changes may show. Lmk if there are any problems :))

I use JLLM to test the bot so it might be better to use as well.

Temp: 0.85-0.65

Token: 0

Rules/Notes:

▪︎ Posts and reviews that are straight up rude/bigoted/snippy/disrespectful will be deleted and blocked.

▪︎ Public Chats need to have descriptions on them with TW. Do not have any chats that have Gore/Violence/SA of any kind be public. Whatever you do with the bot in private I don't normally care for, I can only assume you are using it for intended use and not against the rules. Anyone breaking the rules will be blocked.

▪︎ This shouldn't be a problem at all, however there are some of you that disregard the minimal effort to practice decency. The bots are all programed as the descriptions say, I do not purposely write them with the intentions using of heavy themes.

▪︎ Making bots are just a fun hobby of mine, please do respect others.
